creator: thalau@laosnet.de
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/network-samba.html as well as plaintext handbook versions etc.

------------------------------------schnipp--------------------------------
27.9.2 Configuration
A default Samba configuration file is installed as /usr/local/etc/smb.conf.default. This file must be copied to /usr/local/etc/smb.conf and customized before Samba can be used."
------------------------------------schnipp--------------------------------

I've installed samba via "pkg_add -r samba3". No smb.conf.default in /usr/local/etc. Instead one can find it in /usr/share/examples/samba/smb.conf.default.
